title: Search Integration Events
description: Events and commands used to maintain the platform-wide search index

SearchDocumentUpsertedEvent.description: Published when a service creates or updates a resource that should be indexed for global search

sourceService.description: Service that owns the searchable resource

resourceType.description: Lower-case resource type such as customer, project, invoice, or purchase-order

resourceId.description: Stable identifier of the source resource

status.description: Current business status to display with the result

requiredPermission.description: Permission required to see this result

occurredAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the source resource changed

SearchDocumentDeletedEvent.description: Published when a service removes a resource from the global search index

sourceService.description: Service that owns the searchable resource

resourceType.description: Lower-case resource type such as customer, project, invoice, or purchase-order

resourceId.description: Stable identifier of the source resource

occurredAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the resource was deleted or hidden from search

SearchReindexRequestedCommand.description: Published by SearchService to request services republish their current searchable documents

sourceService.description: Optional service to reindex; null means all search publishers should respond

requestedBy.description: Actor or subsystem that requested reindexing

requestedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when reindexing was requested
